mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (article_id, user_id, content, parent_id, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{articleId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{parentId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.article_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.parent_id, c.create_time, c.update_time, u.username, u.user_pic, u.nickname FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.article_id = #{articleId} ORDER BY c.create_time ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE article_id = #{articleId}
SELECT c.id, c.article_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.parent_id, c.create_time, c.update_time, u.username, u.user_pic, u.nickname FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
